'''kafuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrillarity|fibrillarity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrillarity|fibrillarity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kafuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kæfijith || kæfijij || kæfijish || kæfiji
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kafufujuth || kafufujuj || kafufujush || kafufuju
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kafujuth || kafujuj || kafujush || kafuju
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kafufjufth || kafufjufj || kafufjufsh || kafufjuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kafujuthu || kafujuju || kafujushu || kafujuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || kafujuth || kafujuj || kafujush || kafuju
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kafujuthul || kafujujul || kafujushul || kafujukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kafujuuthuthu || kafujuujuju || kafujuushushu || kafujuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || kafujuthun || kafujujun || kafujushun || kafujukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kafujuthuoro || kafujujuoro || kafujushuoro || kafujukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
